overall.description: First-person perspective of a person walking along a narrow dirt trail through dense forest at night, illuminated by a flashlight or headlamp. The footage shows steady forward movement through dark woodland with only the path ahead visible in the light beam.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail illuminated by flashlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt path, illuminating the trail ahead with a flashlight

thick leafy bushes lining the right side of the trail

tall tree trunk silhouetted against the dark sky on the right
dense tree canopy overhead with small gaps showing the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a continuous walk along a narrow dirt trail through dense forest at night. The path is illuminated by a flashlight revealing dirt ground, flanking bushes, and tall pine trees. The environment remains consistently dark and enclosed with dense vegetation on both sides, and no other agents or significant events occur during the steady forward movement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dense, nocturnal forest where the environment remains consistently dark and enclosed. It begins with a steady walk along a narrow dirt trail, with a flashlight beam cutting through the shadows to reveal the textured ground. As the camera advances, the light flickers across flanking bushes and the towering trunks of pine trees that crowd the path. The scene maintains this claustrophobic atmosphere, pushing deeper into the thick vegetation before finally continuing its unwavering trajectory through the silent woodland.
